name: SCC_CreateServiceDiscoveryRes_ISO
title: SCC_CreateServiceDiscoveryRes_ISO
syntax: long SCC_CreateServiceDiscoveryRes_ISO ( byte SessionID[], dword ConfigSection, char ResponseCode[] )
description: Creates a Service Discovery Response message for sending.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 - 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
